creator: grembo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Allan Jude from comment #21)

Based on Andreas' documentation (https://github.com/AndiDog/zfs-lockup) I could reproduce the issue both on AWS and in a bhyve VM running 11.2-p4 (on top of 12-BETA2).

In both environments, Allan's patch fixed the problem for me (i.e. I can't reproduce the issue any more when running a patched kernel).
